summary: N3 Delta Zonal refactoring testing complete. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: N3 section shows N2 Flow badge, N3 DZ badge, OFI value, TICK value. N3 reason box renders with color-coded border (gray for WAIT). Position Manager shows auto qty (LONG 17x, SHORT 17x). Chart displays ENTRY/SL/TP lines when position is active.

✅ GET /api/v3/signal/MES returns N3 with all required fields
✅ N3 response does NOT include ofi_slow (removed)
✅ N3 response does NOT include absorption_flag (removed)
✅ N3 response does NOT include absorption_side (removed)
✅ N3 reason field contains detailed explanation with metric values
✅ N3 has delta_zonal object with levels and summary
✅ N2 has delta_zonal object with structural levels
✅ N3 signal logic is regime-aware (TRANSICAO detected)
✅ POST /api/positions/evaluate/{symbol} returns max_qty_by_risk
✅ MNQ returns valid N3 signal without errors
✅ MES returns valid N3 signal without errors
✅ N3 includes tick_index and tick_sentiment
✅ N3 includes ofi_fast value
✅ Frontend N3 section shows N2 Flow badge
✅ Frontend N3 section shows N3 DZ badge
✅ Frontend N3 section shows OFI value
✅ Frontend N3 section shows TICK value
✅ Frontend N3 reason box has color-coded border (gray for WAIT)
✅ Frontend LONG button shows auto qty (LONG 17x)
✅ Frontend SHORT button shows auto qty (SHORT 17x)
✅ Chart shows ENTRY price line when position is active
✅ Chart shows SL price line (red) when position is active
✅ Chart shows TP price line (green) when position is active
✅ Position closes successfully and lines disappear
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test position created and closed during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: N3 Delta Zonal refactoring fully tested. Key changes: 1) generate_execution_signal now uses dz_n2_summary, dz_n3_summary, dz_n2_levels, dz_n3_levels, tick_index, tick_sentiment as inputs. 2) Removed ofi_slow, absorption_flag, absorption_side from N3 response. 3) N3 reason field contains detailed explanation with actual metric values. 4) N3 logic varies by regime: TRANSICAO uses N3 absorption or N2 DZ VAH/VAL Z-Score > 1.0, COMPLACENCIA requires N2 bullish + OFI Fast > 0.3 + TICK not bearish, BULL requires pullback to VWAP/+1s + N2 structural bull + OFI Fast > 0.4, BEAR requires bounce to VWAP/-1s + N2 structural bear + OFI Fast < -0.4, CAPITULACAO requires N3 absorption + N2 selling fading + OFI Fast > -0.2. 5) Frontend N3 section shows N2 Flow badge, N3 DZ badge, OFI value, TICK value. 6) N3 reason box has color-coded border (green BUY, red SELL, gray WAIT). 7) Auto position sizing and chart SL/TP/Entry lines working correctly. 8) Market is closed (weekend) so data is simulated. 9) SignalStack orders are MOCKED in paper mode.

feature_verification.n3_dz_n2_status: Working - shows BULLISH_CONFIRMED, BEARISH_CONFIRMED, or MIXED
feature_verification.n3_dz_n3_status: Working - shows ABSORPTION_ACTIVE, AT_EXTREME_LEVEL, or NO_EXTREME_CONTACT
feature_verification.n3_tick_sentiment: Working - shows BULLISH, BEARISH, NEUTRAL, etc.
feature_verification.n3_reason: Working - contains detailed explanation with metric values
feature_verification.frontend_n3_dz_badge: Working - shows N3 DZ: ABSORPCAO/AT LEVEL/Away
feature_verification.frontend_reason_border: Working - green for BUY, red for SELL, gray for WAIT
feature_verification.chart_entry_line: Working - white dashed line at entry price
feature_verification.chart_sl_line: Working - red dashed line at stop loss
feature_verification.chart_tp_line: Working - green dashed line at take profit

observed_values.n3_reason: Aguardando absorcao ou atividade nas bordas VA. N3=NO_EXTREME_CONTACT, VAH Z=0.2, VAL Z=1.1

mocked_api_note: SignalStack orders are not sent in paper mode. LiveDataService disabled. Delta Zonal and OFI use simulation mode on weekends.
